title: diploglossum roylei
intro: Diploglossum roylei, also known as the Himalayan diploglossum, is a rare and endangered epiphytic orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Diploglossum roylei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
